title: After Hours
overview: Two brothers trapped in poverty gamble on day trading as ambition turns to addiction. When one final all-in bet collapses, their home becomes a pressure cooker where love, pride, and survival collide.

title: Vāranāsi
overview: Follows Rudhra's perilous adventures as ancient Varanasi stands on the brink of catastrophe from a looming asteroid in 2027 CE, unfolding across multiple timelines and distant continents.

title: Wings of Freedom
overview: Home-loving eagle Salana is forced out of her jungle bird colony to join Pirro, an intrepid swift and member of the Animal Air Force. This unlikely duo embarks on an epic, high-flying adventure to stop a malevolent AI and save the world.

title: Get Lite
overview: Saunders, a headstrong Bronx teenager, is caught between his love of Litefeet subway dancing and his strict's insistence on becoming an engineer.

title: Rose's Baby
overview: Álvaro and his ex-wife Saffron attempt to set aside the drama of their messy divorce for the sake of their daughter Rose.

title: Sidi Kaba and the Gateway Home
overview: With the help of the goddess Mami Wata, Sidi Kaba, an 8‑year-old boy, tries to find his brother who has been taken prisoner by slave traders. A fantastic epic that delivers us along the road of slavery.

title: Veselchak U
overview: The space pirate Veselchak U got stuck on Earth in our time after a run-in with Alice Selezneva, her mother, and high school students from a Moscow school. More than anything, he wants to take over Cosmion, return to his own time, and finally lead the Pirate Alliance. His search for the artifact leads him to the boy Yura and his mother Katya, who are mysteriously connected to Cosmion. And when the powerful space warrior Theo starts hunting for them, the Merry Man has to stand up for Yura and Katya — after all, he is a noble pirate. Together they embark on a journey full of dangerous adventures to uncover all the secrets of their past and future.

title: Ramon's Revenge
overview: A young boy stumbles across a deserted stash of cocaine.

title: Anatole Latuile
overview: Adaptation of comics created by Olivier Muller, Anne Didier and Clément Devaux and published in the newspaper J'aime lire since 2005.

title: The 08' Club
overview: Dick Negroni begins as a composed bartender at the '08 Club who trades his mixing tins for a life of crime after catching the eye of the powerful mob boss Don Gog. Alongside his volatile partners, Dick must navigate a treacherous path of betrayal and escalating madness where the line between professional "cleanup" and total lunacy begins to blur.

title: F.A.S.T.
overview: A former special forces commando, down on his luck after returning Stateside, is recruited by the DEA to lead a covert black ops team to take down CIA-protected drug dealers.

title: Spaceballs: The New One
overview: Described as "a non-prequel non-reboot sequel part two but with reboot elements franchise expansion film". Plot TBA.

title: The Summer I Turned Pretty: The Movie
overview: A continuation of the events following the end of the TV series 'The Summer I Turned Pretty."

title: Magic Lamp
overview: Shy and sometimes naive schoolboy Sashka lives with his grandmother and confides his secrets to a smart speaker because he has no friends. But Sashka has a special power - faith in miracles, thanks to which he gets into a whirlpool of extraordinary events. In the company of a witty genie from a jug and a smart speaker that has come to life, Alisa, Sashka sets off on a dangerous journey across half the world to find his parents, who after a sandstorm in Uzbekistan ended up in a magical city, captive to Shah Zaman. Sashka and company will face the machinations of the evil sorcerer Yusuf, battles on flying carpets, hot air balloon trips, chases across endless steppes, crossing the desert and meeting people who are ready to help the boy find his family again.

title: All Forgotten Now
overview: A shocking act of terror carried out by ten stateless militants unfolds in a place no one ever imagined could become a hostage site. Over 100 lives are taken captive in exchange for three uncompromising demands.

title: Hanna
overview: USSR, during the Great Patriotic War. A Russian woman saves a German girl, Hannah, who, thanks to their friendship, learns to survive and maintain hope.

title: The Legend of Zelda
overview: A live-action adaptation of Nintendo's Legend of Zelda video game series.

title: The Revenge of La Llorona
overview: A grieving mother's ancient curse targets a troubled family, forcing them to confront their own hidden past while fighting to survive her supernatural wrath.
